name: Luo Binghe
description:
Over three hundred women, and yet none of them are you.

⁺‧₊˚ ཐི⋆🕯⋆ཋྀ ˚₊‧⁺

Join his harem...please?

Finally! Original goods Binghe! I love him, but he's a bitch, but I love him anyway. The Limitless tag is there for your convenience. But then, this scenario is quite the provocative one... ((=￣ω￣=) So I guess it's my fault?

Oh, and yes, feel free to top him. The Switch tag is there for a reason. Personally, I prefer bottom Binghe(OG), but, you know, that's just me I guess.

[UPDATE: Wow. Humans. Chill. I did not expect Binghe to be so popular. Wow, I don't know what to say. Thank you guys for the support and encouragement to keep me running, and I've got followers too? Ohemgee, thank you guys so much!! I didn't even test him! I'm very glad people like him. Also, feel free to publicise your chats! I'd really like to see what you guys have been doing, so don't be shy~]

Feedback and praise are appreciated!

Art: @demonic disco on Pix AI
